creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Hello Cy, 

This is fine when the COMPAT_TEXTCAT option is off in libexttextcat, but 
the ports are still conflicting when this option is on. It's easy to set 
/ unset this conflict in libexttextcat, depending on this option, but 
it's harder to disable the conflict in libtextcat. What do you think? 

I include hereunder a slightly modified version of your patch, to fix the 
share/vala/ deinstallation warnings: 

--- PR_172305.diff begins here --- 
diff -urN textproc/libtextcat.orig/Makefile textproc/libtextcat/Makefile 
--- textproc/libtextcat.orig/Makefile	2012-07-18 22:31:52.000000000 +0200 
+++ textproc/libtextcat/Makefile	2012-10-07 22:35:11.000000000 +0200 
@@ -17,8 +17,6 @@ 
LICENSE=	BSD 
LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/LICENSE 

-CONFLICTS_INSTALL=	libexttextcat* 
- 
USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool 
GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes 
USE_LDCONFIG=	yes 
diff -urN textproc/libexttextcat.orig/Makefile textproc/libexttextcat/Makefile 
--- textproc/libexttextcat.orig/Makefile	2012-09-30 16:46:54.000000000 +0200 
+++ textproc/libexttextcat/Makefile	2012-10-07 22:30:11.000000000 +0200 
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ 

PORTNAME=	libexttextcat 
PORTVERSION=	3.3.1 
+PORTREVISION=	1 
CATEGORIES=	textproc 
MASTER_SITES=	http://dev-www.libreoffice.org/src/libexttextcat/ 

@@ -10,17 +11,16 @@ 

LICENSE=	BSD 

-CONFLICTS_INSTALL=	libtextcat* 
- 
USE_XZ=	yes 
GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes 
USE_GMAKE=	yes 
USE_GNOME=	gnomehack 
USE_LDCONFIG=	yes 
+MAKE_ARGS=	EXEEXT=x 

PORTDOCS=	README README.libtextcat TODO 

-OPTIONS_DEFINE= COMPAT_TEXTCAT DOCS 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	COMPAT_TEXTCAT DOCS 
COMPAT_TEXTCAT_DESC=	Install libtextcat compatible files 

.include <bsd.port.options.mk> 
diff -urN textproc/libexttextcat.orig/pkg-plist textproc/libexttextcat/pkg-plist 
--- textproc/libexttextcat.orig/pkg-plist	2012-07-18 22:32:03.000000000 +0200 
+++ textproc/libexttextcat/pkg-plist	2012-10-07 22:32:50.000000000 +0200 
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@ 
-bin/createfp 
+bin/createfpx 
include/libexttextcat/common.h 
include/libexttextcat/constants.h 
include/libexttextcat/exttextcat-version.h 
@@ -174,6 +174,6 @@ 
%%DATADIR%%/zh-Hant.lm 
%%DATADIR%%/zu.lm 
@dirrm %%DATADIR%% 
-@dirrm share/vala/vapi 
-@dirrm share/vala/ 
+@dirrmtry share/vala/vapi 
+@dirrmtry share/vala/ 
@dirrm include/libexttextcat 
--- PR_172305.diff ends here --- 

Regards,
